details.notes: Added 4mp_varifocal camera type. Refactored quotation tool to support mixed camera types (8x 2MP bullet + 2x 4MP varifocal). Generated MOI Industrial Workshop quotation for 21,453 QAR. Renamed all pro

Added CEO/entrepreneur mindset skill, web search tools, deep research agent, pattern tracking. Key context: user no longer on secuview, now doing AutoCAD + quotations for Starfox. Own projects: asliel
Built learn_quotation.py tool to scan real XLSX files and update rates.json. quotation-coach is now primary project. Also created CEO mindset skill, web search/fetch/deep research tools.
